history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A man resembling Lionel Messi, wearing a black and white striped t-shirt and black patterned shorts, is squatting on a tiled floor, holding a smartphone in his left hand and a cigarette in his right. In front of him, to his left, is a small purple cup, possibly containing a drink or dessert. He is looking at his phone with a focused expression. To his right, leaning against a plain, light-colored wall, is another young man wearing a maroon t-shirt and dark pants. He is seated on the floor, also in a relaxed posture, looking off to the side with his fingers near his face. The floor is tiled with white squares and appears somewhat dirty with scattered debris. The lighting is neutral, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the wall and floor. The overall mood is casual and somewhat mundane, capturing a candid moment. The color palette is dominated by earthy tones, with the white tiles, beige wall, and the clothing of the individuals providing the main visual elements. The style is realistic, like a photograph.
